text.title: testing-js-ts-frontend Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for testing-js-ts-frontend. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Component tests MUST use @testing-library/react (or the framework equivalent) and query by accessible role, label text, or visible text — in that priority order. CSS class selectors and data-testid are last resorts and MUST have a comment explaining why no semantic query was possible.
rule.rationale: Testing by role and visible text tests what users actually see. CSS-class queries break silently on refactor; they test implementation details, not behaviour.

rule.statement: Vitest projects MUST either configure globals: true in vitest.config.ts OR import describe, it, expect, vi explicitly from 'vitest' at the top of every test file. Mixing jest globals with vitest without the globals flag causes silent pollution or compilation errors.
rule.rationale: Agents default to jest globals (no import needed) even in vitest projects, leading to TypeScript errors when @types/jest is not installed or to silent test pollution.
